title: Progress Bar Data
excerpt: In the column settings for the progress bar it would be nice to be able to select statuses to be used, other than done to show as progress other than the green done option. I would like other status color options to be a…

posts.author: Amanda115 (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: In the column settings for the progress bar it would be nice to be able to select statuses to be used, other than done to show as progress other than the green done option. I would like other status color options to be able to be selected as; if status = loaded in trailer change progress to done, increasing the progress bar to indicate more complete while having the status show another option than done.

posts.author: Mirandrah (Miranda Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: I share a similar request. I currently using the mirror column to show progress of subitems but I need to be able to customize values and weights a bit more in depth. Additionally, it would be great if different line items in subitems had values assigned to them rather than columns.
